title: National Law Enforcement Officers Remembrance, Support and Community Outreach Act.
short_title: National Law Enforcement Officers Remembrance, Support and Community Outreach Act.
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Federal Lands.
crs_summary: National Law Enforcement Officers Remembrance, Support and Community Outreach Act. [ sic ] This bill temporarily directs the Department of the Interior to award a grant to the National Law Enforcement Officers Memorial Fund for the expenses associated with operating and enhancing the community outreach, public education, and officer safety and wellness programs of the National Law Enforcement Museum.
